author: Dennis Doughty
text: Enabled Access Wi-Fi Information entitlement in BeaconSpikeApp by adding BeaconSpikeApp/BeaconSpikeApp.entitlements with com.apple.developer.networking.wifi-info=true and wiring CODE_SIGN_ENTITLEMENTS in Debug/Release. Validation: plutil lint OK and xcodebuild BeaconSpikeApp Debug (iPhone 16 simulator) succeeded.

author: Dennis Doughty
text: Added Communication Notifications entitlement (com.apple.developer.usernotifications.communication=true) to BeaconSpikeApp.entitlements to address Focus probe DNDErrorDomain code 1004 logs. Validation: plutil lint OK; xcodebuild Debug for iPhone simulator and generic iOS/device both succeeded with entitlement present in generated xcent.
